No other appearances on this matter. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oswald B. Cousins, Esq. of ORRICK, HERRINGTON 773-5659, for defendant httprint,
inc. demurring party and also moving for a stay the matter pending arbitration

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT httprint, inc.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT and for a stay the matter pending arbitration -- treated as motion to compel arbitration and granted. Demurrer is moot. Defendant is to prepare an order. (PHA/301/EH) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
